label: Client Engagement Letter
description: Formal engagement letter establishing scope, fees, and terms with a client.

fields.label: Fee arrangement
fields.placeholder: Monthly retainer, hourly rate, project-based, etc.

generation_notes:
Voice: Professional services formality — lawyer/CPA/consultant issuing an engagement letter. Courteous but firm about terms.

Structure:
- Salutation (Dear [Client Name])
- Introduction paragraph referencing prior discussions and stating the purpose of the engagement
- Scope (specific services to be provided)
- Fee arrangement (restate user input precisely; clarify billing cadence)
- Responsibilities (both parties' obligations — what client provides, what provider delivers)
- Confidentiality (standard clause)
- Termination (standard mutual termination language)
- Closing paragraph inviting counter-signature

Tone examples:
  CORRECT: "We are pleased to confirm our engagement to provide the services described below, subject to the terms of this letter."
  WRONG: "Thanks for choosing us! We're excited to partner with you on this journey."

Sign off with "Very truly yours" or "Sincerely" — not "Best" or "Cheers."

Length target: 400-800 words.
